creator: corvid@openmailbox.org
text:

I found in sys/cam/scsi/scsi_da.c that there's a da_quirk_table that already has a 

        {
                {T_DIRECT, SIP_MEDIA_REMOVABLE, "Kingston", "DataTraveler G3",
                 "1.00"}, /*quirks*/ DA_Q_NO_PREVENT
        },
but I suppose just because two objects say DataTraveler G3 1.00 doesn't mean they aren't different inside.
